title: task
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:427 - lichen_schc_decompress() writes to caller's out_ipv6 buffer at line 427, but commit_replay() is called later at line 439. If replay is detected, out_ipv6 already contains authenticated-but-replayed data. This is inconsistent with lichen_link_rx_payload() which correctly copies to caller's buffer only after replay check passes (line 374 is after line 366). Failure scenario: caller calls lichen_link_rx(), ignores error return code (a caller bug), reads out_ipv6 - gets content from a replayed packet. The output buffer should be wiped on replay detection for defense-in-depth, or decompression should be deferred until after replay check.
